summary: Ethiopia has NOT acceded to WTO. Working Party still in negotiations. MC14 (March 26-29) is target. Even after Ministerial approval, 30-day waiting period after ratification makes May 1 deadline nearly impossible.
content:
Key facts:
1. Ethiopia's Working Party established Feb 10, 2003 (23+ years in process)
2. WTO accession page still shows 5th meeting (March 2025) as most recent - page appears stale
3. 6th Working Party meeting: Sep 26, 2025 - "entered decisive phase"
4. 7th Working Party meeting scheduled for Jan 2026 (no WTO news item confirming it happened)
5. Jan 29, 2026: Ethiopia-Brazil signed bilateral market access protocol (still doing bilateral deals!)
6. MC14: March 26-29, 2026, Yaoundé, Cameroon
7. WTO accession process after Ministerial approval: sign Protocol → domestic ratification → deposit instruments → 30 days → membership effective
8. Comoros/Timor-Leste precedent: Approved at MC13 (Feb 26, 2024), became members Aug 21/30, 2024 (~6 months later)
9. Working Party Report not yet finalized - still being "upgraded" from Elements to Draft as of Sep 2025
10. Dec 11, 2025: National Forum on accession held in Addis Ababa - still preparatory
